final:
module RefModule(
    // inputs:
    input clk,
    input reset,
    // outputs:
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 0;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
